title: Substack vs Privy (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Substack vs Privy: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Substack and Privy comes down to your specific use case. Substack is built for writers monetising directly from subscribers, while Privy targets Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool.

comparison_table.tool_b: Shopify Stores Wanting Email, Sms, And Popups In One Tool

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on writers monetising directly from subscribers
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Substack wins for writers monetising directly from subscribers, while Privy is stronger for Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Substack or Privy?
faq.a: Substack starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Privy to Substack?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
